2023-06-10T12:31:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to emergency incident , all lanes of Princess Margaret Road (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) near Kowloon City District Headquarters And Hung Hom Divisional Police Station are still being closed to all traffic.   Affected bus routes have been diverted.   Traffic queue on Princess Margaret Road (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) ends at Waterloo Road near Hong Kong Baptist University.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is congested now.
2023-06-10T12:31:00.CONTENT_CN: 因突發事件，公主道(往海底隧道方向)近九龍城警區總部暨紅磡分區警署的全線仍然封閉。  受影響巴士路線須改道行駛。  現時在公主道(往海底隧道方向)的車龍龍尾已到窩打老道近香港浸會大學。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2023-06-10T13:09:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to emergency incident , all lanes of Princess Margaret Road (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) near Kowloon City District Headquarters And Hung Hom Divisional Police Station are still being closed to all traffic. The following affected bus routes (Hong Kong Island bound) have been diverted. Route nos. 113, 170, 182 Citizens please take note KMB services have been affected. Citizens heading to Hong Kong Island please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services. Traffic queue on Princess Margaret Road (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) ends at Waterloo Road near Hong Kong Baptist University. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is congested now.
2023-06-10T13:09:00.CONTENT_CN: 因突發事件，公主道(往海底隧道方向)近九龍城警區總部暨紅磡分區警署的全線仍然封閉。 以下受影響巴士路線(往香港島方向)須改道行駛。 路線號碼:113,170,182 市民請留意九巴服務會受影響。前往往香港島的市民請考慮使用其他公共交通服務，例如港鐵服務。 現時在公主道(往海底隧道方向)的車龍龍尾已到窩打老道近香港浸會大學。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通擠塞。

Citizens heading to Hong Kong Island please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.
